title: Contact Us About Working With NLR
text:
Find information about working with NLR below, or complete the form to submit a question or comment.
To learn about partnering with NLR, partnership agreements, procurement, NLR funding and payment, technology licensing, and commercialization, see the frequently asked questions.
Research Contacts
Are you interested in working directly with or have questions for an NLR researcher? Find contacts within our research areas.
Popular Inquiries
Jobs, Internships, and Postdocs
Search for jobs, internships, or postdoctoral positions. If you have a question, or want to report an issue with the application process or online recruitment tool, contact us about careers.
Product Suppliers and Service Providers
If you're interested in providing NLR with a product or service, see our upcoming purchasing and subcontracting opportunities.
If you have a small business, register to become an NLR vendor or subcontractor.
Inventions and Inventors
If you've invented a renewable energy or energy efficiency technology, see our innovation and entrepreneurship programs.
Partnership Inquiries
Use the form below to submit inquiries regarding NLR's partnership opportunities.
